home.introTitle: Excellence in languages for professional and corporate growth
home.introText: English Way Express develops customized language solutions for companies and professionals who need to communicate with precision, confidence, and performance in real-world scenarios.
home.overviewTitle: Language consulting focused on real-world application
home.overviewText1: For over 13 years, English Way Express has provided customized courses, coaching, consulting, translation, interpretation, and preparation for corporate contexts where language needs to drive concrete results.
home.overviewText2: Our work combines communicative methodology, rapid context reading, and sector-specific customization to support everything from internal routines to high-exposure situations.
home.scenariosText: Rather than offering standardized packages, English Way Express structures language support according to the situation in which communication needs to perform.
home.clientsText: We have built long-term partnerships with large companies across different sectors of the economy.
home.faqText: Some common questions for those evaluating language courses, consulting, or personalized language support.
home.contactText: Talk to our team to design the ideal plan for your company or for your individual development.

trustHighlights.title: Market experience
trustHighlights.description: Working with companies, professionals, and tailor-made projects across different sectors.

trustHighlights.title: Corporate and individual
trustHighlights.description: Solutions designed for both teams and professionals with specific goals.

trustHighlights.title: Fast implementation
trustHighlights.description: Diagnosis and execution focused on real usage context, without generic formulations.

highlightedServices.title: In-Company & Residence Language Courses
highlightedServices.description: Customized programs for teams and professionals focused on fluency applied to daily work.

highlightedServices.title: Coaching
highlightedServices.description: Individual and small group language coaching with clear objectives and measurable progress.

highlightedServices.title: Consulting
highlightedServices.description: Practical support for meetings, events, materials, and strategic processes across multiple business segments.

workflowSteps.title: Needs assessment
workflowSteps.description: We map context, language level, objectives, and operational constraints before proposing a solution.

workflowSteps.title: Customized plan
workflowSteps.description: We structure the ideal format for classes, coaching, consulting, translation, or corporate training.

workflowSteps.title: Follow-up and progress
workflowSteps.description: We adjust the process based on practical language use and demands that arise throughout the journey.

businessScenarios: Selection processes and interviews in other languages
Events, workshops, trade shows, and video or phone conferences
Translation and interpretation for materials and live interactions
Preparation for international exams and certifications

faqItems.question: Does English Way Express serve both companies and individuals?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Our work includes both corporate projects for teams and leaders, as well as individual coaching for professionals with specific goals.

faqItems.question: Are the solutions customized or are there ready-made packages?
faqItems.answer: The work starts with an initial assessment to understand context, level, objective, and urgency. From there, the most appropriate format is defined for each case.

faqItems.question: What services are available?
faqItems.answer: The company works with in-company and residence language courses, coaching, consulting, translation, interpretation, and preparation for international exams and certifications.

faqItems.question: Does the school only work with English?
faqItems.answer: The current focus includes English and Spanish, with an expanding structure for other languages of corporate and professional interest.

faqItems.question: How do I start a conversation about a project?
faqItems.answer: Simply get in touch through the form or WhatsApp. From there, the team evaluates the need and proposes the best path for implementation.
